experiments.name: C03_reproduce_C00_lr0004_bs512_valloss
experiments.reason: Checks whether the very low C00 loss came mainly from the original larger batch and higher learning rate.

experiments.name: C04_aux_features_only
experiments.reason: Tests engineered phenology/spectral features alone, without also changing regularization.

experiments.name: C05_aux_features_small_branch
experiments.reason: Tests whether the auxiliary branch was too strong/noisy by reducing its hidden dimension.

experiments.name: C06_aux_features_no_mask_channels
experiments.reason: Checks whether explicit feature summaries can replace valid-mask channels, reducing input size.

experiments.name: C07_no_query_date_ablation
experiments.reason: Measures how much the model depends on the requested query date.

experiments.name: C08_no_time_date_ablation
experiments.reason: Measures how much the model depends on acquisition-date encoding.

experiments.name: C09_shuffle_labels_sanity
experiments.reason: Must fail; if it performs well, validation is leaking labels or dates.
